name: Indiana Succotash
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup Green onions with tops, Chopped
2 17 oz cans whole kernel corn - drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the green beans into rounds that are about the size of the kernels in the corn.
2. Cook the bean rounds with half a teaspoon of salt for about 15 minutes, or until they are tender. Drain any excess liquid.
3. In a separate pan, sauté the chopped green onions in butter until they become transparent. Do not allow them to brown.
4. Add the drained corn, one teaspoon of salt, paprika, celery salt, and sugar to the pan with the green onions. Stir to combine.
5. Add the bean rounds to the pan and simmer everything together for about 10 minutes, covered, until heated through.
